name: antigravity-telegram-bridge
description: Telegram Webhook & Bridge for Antigravity AI Bot

antigravityBridge.botActive.description: Activate or deactivate the Antigravity Telegram Bridge polling for this workspace.

antigravityBridge.teleBotToken.description: Telegram Bot Token for managing messaging.

antigravityBridge.whitelistChatIds.description: Comma separated list of allowed Chat IDs.

antigravityBridge.agentWorkingDir.description: Directory to watch for response.txt. If relative, it uses the first open workspace.

antigravityBridge.tasksConfigFile.description: Path to the JSON file managing multiple periodic tasks.
